AuthorDetails.Name: Owain Williams
AuthorDetails.Description: Owain Williams is a Senior Developer at Initials Labs and a mutli-awarded Umbraco MVP

Description: An Umbraco package that extends Umbraco Flavoured Markdown (UFM) with a {fbk:} component, giving you property fallbacks and text filters directly inside block labels and other UFM contexts.
Title: OC.UFMFallbacks
